edge_functions.name: check-consent
edge_functions.purpose: Check user email consent status for CASL compliance

edge_functions.name: create-checkout-session
edge_functions.purpose: Create Stripe Checkout session for cart items

edge_functions.name: get-order-confirmation
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch order details for confirmation page (with polling for Stripe webhook)

edge_functions.name: get-wf9-order
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch order data for WF-9 Stripe→email workflow (n8n)

edge_functions.name: get-wf9-order-items
edge_functions.purpose: Fetch order items for WF-9 email workflow

edge_functions.name: log-communication
edge_functions.purpose: Log outbound/inbound email to communication_logs table

edge_functions.name: log-email-consent
edge_functions.purpose: Record email consent per CASL to email_consent_log

edge_functions.name: n8n-proxy
edge_functions.purpose: Proxy requests to n8n webhooks (avoids CORS, hides n8n URL)

edge_functions.name: notify-seller-approval
edge_functions.purpose: Notify n8n when seller is approved (triggers approval email)

edge_functions.name: notify-seller-registration
edge_functions.purpose: Notify n8n when new seller registers (triggers welcome email)

edge_functions.name: stripe-webhook-test
edge_functions.purpose: Test Stripe webhook processing with mock payloads

edge_functions.name: submit-cabinet-match
edge_functions.purpose: Submit cabinet dimension match request (client→product matching)

edge_functions.name: update-communication-status
edge_functions.purpose: Update email delivery status from Mailgun events (WF-11)

edge_functions.name: simulate-inbound-email
edge_functions.purpose: Simulate Mailgun inbound email for WF-10 testing

edge_functions.name: create-wf10-test-user
edge_functions.purpose: Create test user for WF-10 email reply testing

edge_functions.name: seed-wf10-test-data
edge_functions.purpose: Seed test data for WF-10 inbound email testing

email_workflows.WF-8: Email Dispatcher — sends outbound emails via Mailgun, logs to communication_logs
email_workflows.WF-9: Stripe Email Router — Stripe webhook events → email notifications
email_workflows.WF-10: Inbound Email Handler — processes inbound customer replies via Mailgun
email_workflows.WF-11: Mailgun Event Receiver — processes delivery/bounce/open/click events
